title: lamium flexuosum subsp. berengueri
intro: Lamium flexuosum subsp. berengueri, also known as flexible spurge or Spanish spurge, is a type of plant species within the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lamium flexuosum subsp. berengueri include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions or ointments, which are traditionally used to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
